hazard.summary: CI times out waiting for switches to become ready; root cause is control VM e1000 Tx Unit Hang causing control-plane reachability loss, while diagnostics fail via SSH timeouts; mitigation (disable offloads) regresses because settings reset on systemd-networkd reconfigure.
signals: ERR Failed to wait for ready err="waiting for ready: context deadline exceeded"
WRN Some diagnostics collection failed ... (Connection timed out)
kernel: e1000 ... Detected Tx Unit Hang (control-1)
ethtool shows TSO/GSO/GRO unexpectedly ON during failing runs
systemd-networkd CHANGE resets offload settings; udev ethtool not applied on CHANGE events

constraints: Timeout classification MUST NOT be terminal when strong root-cause signals exist (e.g., Tx Unit Hang). The system MUST emit/retain root-cause hints alongside deadline exceeded.
Mitigations relying on OS/network configuration MUST be verified at runtime (guardrail must be persistent, not best-effort).
Diagnostics collection MUST degrade gracefully when SSH fails (console fallback or explicit diagnostics_unavailable classification), rather than burying root-cause evidence.
verification: Detection: classifier triggers when 'Switches status notReady=' repeats >=15 times and job ends with 'context deadline exceeded'.
Root-cause confirmation: show-tech/dmesg contains 'e1000 ... Detected Tx Unit Hang' on control VM for failing runs.
Guardrail proof: add CI step early to assert `ethtool -k <iface>` matches expected OFF set; fail loudly with diff if not.
Persistence: ensure offload disable re-applies on network reconfigure (e.g., networkd-dispatcher or equivalent); verify by re-reading ethtool after reconfigure.
Outcome: recurrence rate of this signature drops materially; if it recurs, logs classify it as tx_hang/controlplane_unreachable within minutes.
notes: Key lesson: mitigation drift. Disabling offloads once is insufficient if systemd-networkd resets settings on CHANGE events. Add runtime verification + persistent reapply hook, and ensure timeout errors preserve root-cause hints.
